title: [agent] Prove AgentDesk public alpha loop
objective:
[agent] Prove AgentDesk public alpha loop

Source issue:
## Objective
Create a tiny proof artifact showing the Guild AgentDesk alpha works from a clean external repo.

## Allowed scope
README.md, docs/**, .agentdesk/**

## Acceptance criteria
- A mandate is created from this GitHub issue.
- The mandate is claimed by an agent.
- Proof artifacts include test_report, changed_files, and handoff_summary.
- AgentDesk verify passes.
- A replay bundle is exported and committed.

## Notes for the agent
Keep the change intentionally tiny so the demo focuses on the workflow, not code complexity.

acceptance_criteria.description: Tests pass or failure is explained.
